name: twos
title: Twos
description: Capture and organize your lists, to-dos, notes, and reminders in Twos.
author: parker_klein

commands.name: add-thing
commands.title: Add Thing
commands.subtitle: Twos
commands.description: Add a to-do, note, or hyperlink to a list.

commands.name: search-things
commands.title: Search Things
commands.subtitle: Twos
commands.description: Search and browse your things; complete or open them.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: A Twos API key from Settings → Advanced → API Keys.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
